name: Aidbase API
description: Aidbase provides AI-powered customer support tools. The API enables management of knowledge bases, chatbots, ticket forms, tickets, email inboxes, and chat interactions. Build AI chatbots that answer questions from your knowledge base and handle customer support tickets.
